dataset.name: Beacon API Event Stream
dataset.description: Events derived from the Beacon API event stream. This data is usually useful for 'timing' events, such as when a block was seen by a sentry. Because of this it usually has the same data but from many different instances. These tables are usually fairly slim and contain only a few columns. These tables can be joined with the canonical tables to get a more complete view of the data. For example, you can join the beacon_api_eth_v1_events_block table on block_root or slot with the canonical_beacon_block table to get the block data for each block.

tables.name: beacon_api_eth_v1_beacon_committee
tables.quirks: Sometimes sentries may [publish different committees](https://github.com/ethpandaops/xatu/issues/288) for the same epoch.
tables.description: Contains beacon API /eth/v1/beacon/states/{state_id}/committees data from each sentry client attached to a beacon node.

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: When the sentry received the event from a beacon node

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number in the beacon API committee payload

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: committee_index
columns.description: The committee index in the beacon API committee payload

columns.name: validators
columns.description: The validator indices in the beacon API committee payload

columns.name: epoch
columns.description: The epoch number in the beacon API committee payload

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_version
columns.description: Version of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_implementation
columns.description: Implementation of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_os
columns.description: Operating system of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_ip
columns.description: IP address of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_city
columns.description: City of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country
columns.description: Country of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country_code
columns.description: Country code of the client that generated the event

columns.description: Latitude of the client that generated the event
